rulings.Case Title: JOSEPHINE CHU VS. KEINEN A. EDWARDS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 12, 2014, Line 7: PLAINTIFF JOSEPHINE CHU's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint: DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff may proceed with its complaint as alleged (without amendment) and seek any damages recoverable in the unlawful detainer action. However, if Plaintiff wishes to amend the complaint to seek damages not recoverable in the Unlawful Detainer action, a motion for leave to amend has to be made in conformity with CCP 473 and CRC 3.1324. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 12, 2014, Line 9: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL CARMIGNANI's Motion To Tax Costs: DENIED. Plaintiff's costs are reasonably necessary to conduct the forcible detainer litigation and are reasonable in amount. = (501/REQ)
